name: create-lillie

metadata.name: create-lillie
metadata.summary: A CLI tool for creating lilliepy projects

documentation:
# create-lillie

```bash
create-lillie --is-empty YOUR_PROJECT_NAME
```
* create-lillie - cli name
* --is-empty - if used, will generate empty project, if not, will generate starter project
* YOUR_PROJECT_NAME - name for your project

functions.name: cli.create_project
documentation:
Create a new project by copying a template folder.

Args:
    name (str): The name of the new project.
    is_empty (bool): If True, copy the empty template. Otherwise, copy the starter template.
